% Bold = every method whose mean is within 0.05pp of the column-best.
% TanGCE family naming: TanGCE = manifold loop only; TanGCE+ = LEACE + manifold;
% TanGCE++ = LEACE + CovMatch K=2 + manifold (the headline pipeline).
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{\textbf{Main result.} \emph{Leakage (pp)}: signed $S - S_{\text{floor}}$ at the trajectory step closest to majority-class chance, in pp; $0$ = at chance, lower in absolute value = stronger erasure. \emph{@chance}: settings driven to chance ($|S{-}S_{\text{floor}}| \le 0.5$pp) over settings the method reached the budget on. All 39 NLP panels (13 model families $\times$ 3 concepts) at 50\%-depth, fresh nonlinear probe ($h{=}128$, 200 SGD, patience 3); LEACE-only and LEACE$+$CovMatch $K{=}2$ are one-shot closed-form. \TanGCEpp{} is the proposed pipeline at fixed $\varepsilon{=}0.1$, $h{=}512$; \TanGCE{} drops both preprocessing stages and \TanGCEp{} drops only CovMatch. Bold = column-best; multiple methods within 0.05pp of the best are all bolded. Per-panel detail across all 39 panels is in App.~Tab.~\ref{tab:per_panel_breakdown}.}
\label{tab:main_results_unified}
